name: NeuroSeed
motive: Consent-first learning reinforcement using awake study, cue association, sleep-safe replay, and next-day recall checks.
priority_reason: Newest concept project; useful if kept science-grounded and privacy-first.
next_build: Polish the static prototype into a local study flow with Second Brain memory, AI lesson compression, flashcards, cue library, consent log, Mermaid/Excalidraw learning maps, and morning recall tests.
integration_role: Kattappa AI OS can summarize lessons, generate recall questions, manage cue schedules, and keep ethical boundaries visible.
safety_boundary: Original brain-upload motive is history only. No memory upload claims, no unconscious persuasion, no unapproved sleep cueing, and no clinical claims without research review.
